# Bibliography

Converted from `14_bibliography.bib` so the pack remains Markdown-only.

```bibtex
% Simple bibliography file generated for the study pack. Check exact fields before academic submission.

@article{vakratsas_ambler_1999,
  title = {How Advertising Works: What Do We Really Know?},
  author = {Demetrios Vakratsas and Tim Ambler},
  year = {1999},
  url = {https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/002224299906300103},
  note = {Peer-reviewed review paper; Publisher/JSTOR page; library access may be needed}
}

@article{sethuraman_tellis_briesch_2011,
  title = {How Well Does Advertising Work? Generalizations from Meta-Analysis of Brand Advertising Elasticities},
  author = {Raj Sethuraman and Gerard J. Tellis and Richard A. Briesch},
  year = {2011},
  url = {https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1509/jmkr.48.3.457},
  note = {Peer-reviewed meta-analysis; Publisher page; author copies/mirrors may exist}
}

@article{korkames_stanley_stremersch_2025,
  title = {Meta-analysis of Advertising Effectiveness: New Insights from Improved Bias Corrections},
  author = {Joseph Korkames and T. D. Stanley and Stefan Stremersch},
  year = {2025},
  url = {https://personal.eur.nl/stremersch/artikels/Korkames_Stanley_and_Stremersch_IJRM_2025_print.pdf},
  note = {Peer-reviewed meta-analysis / bias correction; Open PDF from author university page}
}

}
```
